case_title: BRODER CATHY VS CITY AND COUNTY OF SF CLAIMS DEPT.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $130.00 FILED BY BRODER CATHY AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SF CLAIMS DEPT. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-06-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BRODER CATHY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SF CLAIMS DEPT. $130.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $145.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
